briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether the INFO register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the BOOTMODE register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the READY register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the ERASEPROTECT register is present.
Symbol indicating whether the RESET register is present.
New data from the peer is available.
Data has been read by the peer.
CTRLAP events.
Interrupt on RXREADY event.
Interrupt on TXDONE event.
CTRLAP interrupts.
Normal mode of operation.
ROM operation mode.
CTRLAP secure domain boot mode.
No reset is performed.
Soft reset is performed.
Hard reset is performed.
Pin reset is performed.
CTRLAP reset types.
Function for clearing the specified CTRLAP event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the CTRLAP event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified CTRLAP event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested event.
of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_ctrlap_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_ctrlap_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_ctrlap_int_mask_t values for bit masking.
of enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

simplesect.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_ctrlap_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading data sent from the debugger to the CPU.

simplesect.para: Reading from this register will clear pending status of RX.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
sent from the debugger to the CPU.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if data sent from the debugger to the CPU has been read.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Data pending in register RXDATA.
No data pending in register RXDATA.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading data sent from CPU to debugger.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
sent from the CPU to the debugger.

briefdescription.para: Function for writing data sent from CPU to debugger.

detaileddescription.para: Writing to this register will automatically set field DataPending in register TXSTATUS.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Data to send.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if data sent from the CPU to the debugger has been read.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Data pending in register TXDATA.
No data pending in register TXDATA.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking boot mode.

simplesect.para: If ROM operation mode is set the MAILBOX is used to communicate the secure ROM operations.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the CTRLAP device information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the device information structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the CTRLAP device information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the data structure to be filled with device information.

briefdescription.para: Function for locking erase operation in CTRLAP until next reset.

simplesect.para: Some devices do not support erase operation unlocking. Refer to the Product Specification for more information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if erase is to be locked, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading lock of the CTRLAP erase protection.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for performing a secure erase of the device.

simplesect.para: To perform a secure erase, the value of key needs to be non-zero and match with the key on the debugger side.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Key for performing a secure erase.

briefdescription.para: Function for triggering a reset of requested type.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested reset type.
